7.reason: [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and may cause compilation errors or warnings. Use 'fgets' instead.]

21.reason: [Should use "%c" to print the character, not "%d" which prints the ASCII value as an integer.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Should use "%c" to print the character, not "%d" which prints the ASCII value as an integer.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Using %d to print a character code as integer instead of %c to print the actual digit character]
